title: Junior AI & Automation Specialist
bullets: Researched and implemented AI tools to enhance workflows across marketing, operations, and customer service teams.
Developed automations using Power Automate, Zapier, and ClickUp to streamline repetitive tasks.
Built dashboards for task tracking, improving team collaboration and providing insights via KPIs like ticket status and performance.
Automated reporting pipelines to cut manual entry errors by 80% and reduce processing time by 60%.
Created an automated customer response system using Respond.io with custom AI logic, supporting 20+ service pages.
Managed 26 browser profiles and proxies for 11 team members with automated monitoring and credential tracking tools.
Delivered daily automated reporting alerts to reduce management overhead by 50%.

title: Rate Analyst
bullets: Updated insurance plan rates based on employee census data and insurer guidelines.
Debugged and optimized a medical proposal system using C# and no-code tools.
Improved data flow accuracy by identifying and correcting systematic errors.
Developed custom scripts using PowerShell to automate repetitive tasks, significantly reducing manual workload.
Created internal testing tools using VBA to validate rate updates, detect anomalies, and streamline the QA process for faster, more accurate verification.

title: AI & Automation Engineer
bullets: Implemented a dynamic Airtable assignment system using a map-based lookup, matching designers, editors, and executives to articles based on variables like publication, keywords, and other criteria, eliminating hard-coded assignments and automating role allocation for hundreds of articles.
Built an n8n workflow that synchronizes guest invitation statuses from a client system to our database, with Siri integration for real-time, hands-free status checks by the backend team.

Developed Aimina 3.0, an AI news-pitching agent using RAG architecture, vector embeddings, cosine similarity, and multi-stage AI filtering, processing 400+ daily articles from 20+ sources and distilling them into a curated set of high-quality pitches.

Created an n8n scraping workflow that extracts product data from Shopify, Zamit, WooCommerce, and custom websites using API and HTML parsing, automating product collection across multiple e-commerce platforms.

Built an automated subtitles workflow integrated with Airtable that generates SRT files from audio attachments, routes text for editorial proofreading, and applies corrections automatically, accelerating the video production process.
Developed a Python-based UI application that downloads videos from multiple platforms via URL, streamlining content sourcing and enabling editors to work locally with minimal setup.

Created a Python application that overlays subtitles on audio/video files, providing playback controls for timing validation and correction, improving subtitle accuracy, and reducing errors before publication.
